belier.intro: Sunday opens under a waxing crescent Moon joining Venus in Gemini, dear Aries, lighting up your zone of exchanges and curiosity. Mars, your ruler, lets you catch your breath after the past few days so you can put words on what's moving through you. The Sun in Taurus keeps you anchored in your resources, you can speak about money without tensing up.
belier.love: Venus in Gemini makes you especially eloquent in your bonds today. If you are partnered, a light conversation early in the day can revive a closeness that routine had dulled. If you are single, a message sent without calculation sometimes opens more doors than a long strategy.
belier.work: You have the chance to put on paper an idea that has been wandering through your mind for weeks. An informal exchange, a phone call or a well-crafted email can move a financial or commercial file forward. A well-placed word matters more than a major push today.
belier.energy: Your body enjoys light and varied movement, a city walk, a bike ride, a little gardening. Avoid long stretches of stillness that would only raise inner tension.
belier.intuition: The Gemini Moon whispers that your truth sometimes lives in nuance more than in dramatic flashes. Note the thoughts that keep returning, they trace a heading for the week.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun still shines in your sign, dear Taurus, and the waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of resources and body. Venus, your ruler, invites you to value what you already hold rather than chase the new. The day carries the taste of a quiet, almost tangible gratitude.
taureau.love: The attraction you radiate stays tangible, softer and warmer than conquering. If you are partnered, you can offer a small symbolic gift that speaks louder than a long speech. If you are single, your reassuring presence draws those who seek the real over the spectacular.
taureau.work: You have the chance to revisit a rate, follow up with a client or refresh a personal budget. A calm financial decision today will lay solid ground for the whole month. Think fair value rather than low price.
taureau.energy: Your body asks for sensory pleasure, good food, a massage, a walk in the sun. Honor the request without guilt, this is how you truly recharge.
taureau.intuition: Your wisdom today moves through your senses and your hands more than your head. A simple manual activity can bring you an answer that reflection could not find.
taureau.mantra: What I already have feeds my joy
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The waxing Moon glides toward your sign, dear Gemini, and joins Venus already settled with you. Mercury, your ruler, hands you a particularly fluid day to express yourself and become visible with grace. The Sun in Taurus still asks you to keep a quiet inner pocket before your solar birthday season arrives.
gemeaux.love: Venus at home in your sign heightens your magnetism, especially when you show up as you truly are. If you are partnered, daring to name what you hope for in the coming month can surprise the other in a good way. If you are single, a Sunday encounter in a cafe, a bookshop or an exhibition can carry a special flavor.
gemeaux.work: Sunday lends itself to setting a clear intention for the week rather than grinding through tasks. You have the chance to write down three precise priorities and drop everything else without guilt. Tonight's clarity shapes Monday's effectiveness.
gemeaux.energy: Your mind spins fast, balance it with deep breathing or a silent walk. Hydrate more than usual to support this flow of ideas.
gemeaux.intuition: A part of you already sees clearly on a subject you have been postponing. Ask yourself one single question tonight and let the answer ripen without forcing it.
gemeaux.mantra: I show up as I am with confidence
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The waxing Moon, your ruler, joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of retreat and rest, dear Cancer. You may feel a legitimate need to slow the pace and give yourself a more inward Sunday. The Sun in Taurus still connects you to the pleasure of a carefully chosen circle of friends.
cancer.love: The atmosphere favors quiet bonds and low-voiced conversations over grand scenes. If you are partnered, a moment shared without an agenda can nourish more than a long outing. If you are single, a soft intuition about someone can clarify if you take the time to listen without rushing.
cancer.work: You have the chance to prepare your week without truly starting it, the way one sharpens tools before the work. An idea that arises in daydreaming today might illuminate a complex file tomorrow. Note everything that passes through you, without filtering.
cancer.energy: Your nervous system needs quiet, turn down the volume around you. A bath or a nap will replenish you more than a third coffee.
cancer.intuition: Your dreams carry a clear message today, listen to them as you would a longtime friend. The subtle is your territory, and it is especially fertile right now.
cancer.mantra: I allow myself a gentler Sunday
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of friendships and collective projects, dear Leo. You may feel like reconnecting with a circle that fits you, a dear friend, or setting a friendly intention for the month. The Sun, your ruler, in Taurus quietly supports your professional ambition that is ripening in the background.
lion.love: Friendships sometimes hold more than you realize in the moment. If you are partnered, an outing shared with others can revive your closeness in an unexpected way. If you are single, a friend could act as a bridge toward a person who fits you better than you imagined.
lion.work: You have the chance to consider a group project or to join a collective dynamic that will help carry your ambition further. An informal discussion can plant an important seed for the weeks ahead. Open up to the help that shows up, even indirectly.
lion.energy: Your body enjoys the warmth of others today, accept a lunch invitation or a coffee with friends. Laughter recharges you more than a solitary nap.
lion.intuition: Your heart already knows who it wants to walk with through the coming seasons. Ask yourself whom you want to thank today, and do it simply, without ceremony.
lion.mantra: My friendships carry my ambitions further
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini at the top of your chart, dear Virgo, and activates your zone of vocation. Mercury, your ruler, gives you especially precise words to speak about your professional path with finesse. The Sun in Taurus connects you to a wider horizon than usual, almost inspiring.
vierge.love: Your public glow draws unexpected Sunday eyes, sometimes through a screen. If you are partnered, talking about your long-term life project can deepen the bond. If you are single, someone met through a context tied to your career or learning may charm you with their inner coherence.
vierge.work: You have the chance to set a clear professional intention or to polish a presentation, a website, a bio you had been putting off. A word planted today may bear fruit before month's end. Don't underestimate the value of a well-crafted message.
vierge.energy: Your tone is good but tends to scatter, choose one physical priority per day. A walk in the sun will recenter you better than a long ambitious program.
vierge.intuition: Your vocation speaks to you through a meeting, a reading, a seemingly trivial detail. Stay attentive to whatever shows up three times in the day.
vierge.mantra: I name with clarity the path that calls me
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus, your ruler, in Gemini in your zone of expanded horizons, dear Libra. You may feel an urge to learn, to travel mentally or to sign up for a training that makes you dream. The Sun in Taurus deepens in parallel your relationship with intimacy, more quietly in the background.
balance.love: Attraction to whatever sits outside your usual habits runs particularly strong today. If you are partnered, planning a trip or exploring a topic together can revive closeness beautifully. If you are single, a person from a different background, culture or path may spark your curiosity in a surprising way.
balance.work: You have the chance to explore a training, a foundational book or a project with international flavor that widens your field. Research done today can illuminate a decision next week. Curiosity is a strategic skill today, in its own right.
balance.energy: Your body needs air and light, head outside for a walk if the weather allows. A change of scenery will serve you better than a whole day on the couch.
balance.intuition: An idea bigger than you is asking to enter your life, make room for it. A meeting, a book or a journey could carry a key you don't yet suspect.
balance.mantra: My curiosity takes me exactly where I need to go
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of intimacy and shared resources, dear Scorpio. Pluto, your ruler, supports a deep conversation that may gently transform an important bond. The Sun in Taurus opposite you invites you in parallel to clarify a key partnership.
scorpion.love: Emotional intimacy is especially fertile today, particularly if you dare speak about what circulates beneath the surface. If you are partnered, a soft confession can transform the quality of the bond for months to come. If you are single, an attraction can take on an almost magnetic quality, trust your body's signals.
scorpion.work: A shared financial question, a contract, a joint budget can benefit from being laid out today. You have the chance to address a money topic you had been postponing. Precision protects the relationship more than it threatens it.
scorpion.energy: Your natural intensity benefits from being channeled through gentle physical activity. Avoid stimulants late in the day to preserve the quality of your sleep.
scorpion.intuition: You sense what others leave unsaid, use it generously rather than analytically. Your lucidity becomes a tool of care when it is offered with tenderness.
scorpion.mantra: My depth is a gift, not a burden
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini across from your sign, dear Sagittarius, activating your zone of partnerships. Jupiter, your ruler, invites you to savor the quality of your important bonds rather than multiply the number. The Sun in Taurus supports in parallel your attention to daily life and small disciplines.
sagittaire.love: The bond with the other takes on a special flavor today, as if every exchange carried a hidden gift. If you are partnered, a tender word offered without reason can warm a whole week. If you are single, a Sunday encounter may surprise you with its fluidity and ease.
sagittaire.work: A collaboration, a key client or a business partner could be the subject of a fertile discussion this weekend. You have the chance to lay fresh foundations for a partnership with more balance and mutual respect. A spoken word beats a silent rumination.
sagittaire.energy: Your body needs steadiness more than feats, choose a regular movement you can sustain. A daily walk will do more than one isolated intense session.
sagittaire.intuition: The other reveals something about you today, without even knowing. Listen to what touches you in a conversation, it is a precious mirror.
sagittaire.mantra: I meet the other with an open heart
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of daily life and body, dear Capricorn. Saturn, your ruler, reminds you that greatness also comes from small disciplines held with joy. The Sun in Taurus connects you in parallel to creativity and simple pleasure, like a happy counterpoint.
capricorne.love: Attention to the small gestures of shared daily life nourishes the relationship more than one grand isolated move. If you are partnered, a service offered with tenderness carries the weight of a real gift. If you are single, caring for your lifestyle naturally raises your glow, without any effort at seduction.
capricorne.work: You have the chance to set up a new professional routine, a rhythm, a tool, a planning that truly fits you. An organization put in place today will free up several hours a week. The simple system beats the complex one over the long run.
capricorne.energy: Your body deserves gentle attention today, stretches, walking, careful hydration. Rest is a strategy, not a weakness.
capricorne.intuition: Your body speaks louder than usual, listen to fatigue, hunger, thirst as reliable messengers. Today's wisdom is earthy and concrete.
capricorne.mantra: I tend the daily life that carries me
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of creativity and play, dear Aquarius. Uranus, your ruler, supports a day that feels lighter and more colorful than usual. The Sun in Taurus brings you back in parallel to your home, your roots, your deep emotional security.
verseau.love: The atmosphere favors tender and playful moments, far from heavy serious talks. If you are partnered, an activity shared just for the joy of it will seal the bond more than any review. If you are single, you glow more when you have fun, dare the places that make you smile spontaneously.
verseau.work: A creative intention set today can bear fruit for months. You have the chance to dare a project that truly fits you, even if it steps a little outside the expected boxes. Joy is a strategic indicator, not a luxury.
verseau.energy: Your body asks for pleasure and play, dance, draw, laugh without holding back. Seriousness can wait until Monday morning without harm.
verseau.intuition: Your inner child has something to tell you, take five minutes to listen. The path it points to is not naive, it is simply alive.
verseau.mantra: My joy also builds my future
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waxing Moon joins Venus in Gemini in your zone of home and roots, dear Pisces. Neptune, your ruler, helps you turn your dwelling into a truly sensitive refuge. The Sun in Taurus supports in parallel fluid exchanges with the people close to you.
poissons.love: Domestic intimacy gains ground, and a moment shared at home is worth a thousand noisy outings. If you are partnered, you can talk about what you want to build together in the months to come. If you are single, tend your nest, love likes to enter welcoming and lively spaces.
poissons.work: A question tied to your workplace, your remote setup or your home organization deserves your attention. You have the chance to arrange your space to better serve your concentration. The inner frame shapes the outer work, more than we tend to think.
poissons.energy: Your body asks for a cocoon, give yourself a quiet Sunday if you can. Deep sleep awaits if you put down the screens early in the evening.
poissons.intuition: Your family lineage speaks to you through small coincidences today. Note what passes through you, it may be an inheritance asking at last to be named.
poissons.mantra: My home is the cradle of my creativity
poissons.author: Sibylle
